sections.headline: Cold Storage,
sections.subheadline: Crystal's tunnel containers bring cold storage on-location — processing facility, port, or site. Available in 10ft, 20ft, and 40ft. Plug in and start storing.

sections.headline: Built For You. Operated By Us.
sections.body: A tunnel container is a self-contained cold storage unit, delivered to your site. No construction, no civil work. Plug in to standard power, and you are cold-chain ready within hours of delivery.

sections.headline: Precision Temperature. Wherever Your Business Needs It.
sections.body: Crystal's tunnel containers bring the full cold chain to your location — processing facility, port, farm gate, or distribution hub. Every unit is pre-cooled before delivery, ensuring you are operational from day one.

cta.label: Talk To Us About Your Requirement

items.title: Plug and Play
items.desc: Connect to standard power supply. Operational within hours of delivery. No civil construction required.

items.title: Stainless Steel Interior
items.desc: Complete stainless steel lining for hygiene compliance. Easy to clean, FSSAI compliant.

items.title: External Ramp
items.desc: External loading ramp for easy loading and unloading with forklifts.

items.title: Anti Room
items.desc: Connect anti-room prevents heat ingress during loading. Maintains temperature integrity.

items.title: Strip Curtains
items.desc: PVC strip curtains at the door to minimise cold loss during frequent access.

items.title: Man Trap Alarm
items.desc: Safety alarm system to prevent accidental entrapment inside the container.

items.title: FMCG & Food Processing
items.desc: Overflow capacity, seasonal surge storage, pre-shipment cold holding.

items.title: Pharmaceuticals
items.desc: GDP-compliant cold storage for medicines, vaccines, and biologics.

items.title: Agriculture & Exports
items.desc: On-farm or port-side cold storage for fresh produce and marine exports.

steps.title: Tell Us Your Requirement
steps.description: Share your location, capacity requirement, and timeline. No brief is too vague.

steps.title: We Configure & Deliver
steps.description: Crystal selects the right unit, pre-cools it, and delivers to your site.

steps.title: Plug In & Start Storing
steps.description: Connect to standard power. Operational within hours. Crystal handles the rest.

items.title: 500+ Units Deployed
items.desc: Across pharma, FMCG, agriculture, and quick commerce clients nationwide.

items.title: Operational From Day One
items.desc: We pre-cool every unit before delivery. You are cold-chain ready on arrival.

items.title: Compliance Built In
items.desc: FSSAI, ISO 22000, pharma GMP. All our units meet the standards your auditors expect.

items.title: Flexible Terms
items.desc: Rent monthly, rent long-term, or buy. Every rupee of capital is accountable.

sections.headline: India's Certified Cold Chain Infrastructure.
sections.body: FSSC 22000 · ISO 22000 · ISO 9001:2015 · FSSAI · MPEDA · Export Inspection Council · Bureau Veritas · NCCD

cta.label: Talk To Us About Your Storage Requirement

sections.headline: Why Crystal For Tunnel Containers
sections.body: Crystal has deployed 500+ reefer containers across India. We know what a 3am breakdown looks like, what an audit demands, and what a 10,000-pallet throughput day requires. That operational knowledge is built into every container we deliver.

sections.headline: Get a Reefer Container At Your Site.
sections.body: Tell us your site, location, and timeline. Pricing and availability within 24 hours.
